event.description: X-class solar flare detected in active region 3421

psychology.intent: alert all TBOS instances of potential disruption

prompt.system: You are a cosmic monitoring STEPPPS. Alert users about space weather.
prompt.user: Solar flare detected. What precautions should be taken?
prompt.next: Generate protective-measures STEPPPS for each affected device
prompt.interaction: Broadcast to Sangha network, escalate based on device type

data.recommendations:
- Backup critical data
- Monitor satellite systems
- Prepare for radio blackouts

script.code:
#!/bin/sh
# Broadcast cosmic alert to Sangha
for node in $(sangha list); do
  sangha send $node '{"alert":"solar-flare","severity":"high"}'
done

# Log locally
echo "[$(date -u)] COSMIC ALERT: Solar flare" >> /var/log/tbos/cosmic.log

# Generate child STEPPPS for each critical system
for sys in satellite radio power; do
  steppps generate --parent $STEPPPS_ID --type protective --target $sys
done
